mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('feedback_seq')
INSERT INTO feedback (id, user_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{content}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.content, f.created_at, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name FROM feedback f JOIN users u ON u.id = f.user_id ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
